scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/stealth_attestation.r1cs pot16_final.ptau build/stealth_attestation_0000.zkey
scripts.contribute: snarkjs zkey contribute build/stealth_attestation_0000.zkey build/stealth_attestation_final.zkey --name='Opaque Phase 1'
scripts.export-vkey: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/stealth_attestation_final.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.export-sol: snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier build/stealth_attestation_final.zkey build/Groth16Verifier.sol
scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 prove build/stealth_attestation_final.zkey build/stealth_attestation_js/witness.wtns build/proof.json build/public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify build/verification_key.json build/public.json build/proof.json
